### Stats

| Stat | wasm× | call× |
|------|------:|------:|
| min | 47.9× | 1.05× |
| **median** | **110.4×** | **1.13×** |
| mean | 121.3× | 1.15× |
| max | 256.0× | 1.61× |

### Takeaways

1. PF wasm advantage remains large vs near-sdk (framework-free EmitWat).
2. Call gas stays near parity (~1.05–1.26×); storage host ops dominate.
3. Blocked Product: full Stdlib.ERC4626 (NEAR asset crosscall strings); TokenSpec-only Soulbound plan (body is SoulboundTokenBody).

```sh
just near-compare-matrix
just near-compare-all-live
```
